body:
If we use complicated forcings in the model, for example the [ECCORestoring](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/blob/05e6de31ba58594775f739cca47e6ae0ffbf3385/src/DataWrangling/ECCO/ECCO_restoring.jl#L235) type we use in ClimaOcean, we could incur in parameter space by passing all the forcings in the kernels, see:
https://buildkite.com/clima/climaocean-examples/builds/942#01932566-3781-41ab-9464-031b0bfcf562
and
https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/pull/244

This PR should reduce the parameter space in those cases by passing only the u and v specific forcings.

labels.description: Where Oceananigans gets its powers from
labels.name: GPU 👾

title: Reduce parameter space for velocity tendency kernels
